class FenwickTree:
    def __init__(self, size):
        self.size = size
        self.bit = [0] * (size + 1)

    def update(self, index, delta):
        """
        Adds 'delta' to the element at the given 'index'.
        Index is 0-based, internally converted to 1-based.
        """
        index += 1  # Convert to 1-based index
        while index <= self.size:
            self.bit[index] += delta
            index += index & (-index)

    def prefix_sum(self, index):
        """
        Returns the sum of elements from index 0 up to the given 'index' (inclusive).
        Index is 0-based, internally converted to 1-based.
        """
        index += 1  # Convert to 1-based index
        s = 0
        while index > 0:
            s += self.bit[index]
            index -= index & (-index)
        return s

    def range_sum(self, left, right):
        """
        Returns the sum of elements in the range [left, right] (inclusive).
        Both left and right are 0-based indices.
        """
        if left > right:
            return 0
        return self.prefix_sum(right) - self.prefix_sum(left - 1)
